reviews.comment:
Muy lenta la atención , ni siquiera me dijo que ya venía y no quisieron abrir el toldo para cubrir más el sol

(Translated by Google)
The service was very slow, they didn't even tell me they were coming and they refused to open the awning to provide more shade from the sun

reviews.comment:
Los playeros son muy amables, tanto en la playa como en el servicompras. La comida es muy rica y sus precios son sensatos.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants are very friendly, both on the beach and at the convenience store. The food is delicious and the prices are reasonable.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, pregunten los lugares donde quieren recorrer. Saben. Y l verdad si te olvidaste un cargador de celu para el auto, ahí tienen varias opciones. Sin dar vueltas, vayan ahí. Excelente para viajeros.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Ask about places you want to visit. They know their stuff. And if you've forgotten a car charger, they have several options. No need to hesitate, just go there. Excellent for travelers.
